name: Carolina Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Carolina Country Club in Spartanburg, SC! There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Cc Woodson Community Center
description: Cc Woodson Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Spartanburg, SC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Duncan Park
description: Come play pickleball at Duncan Park in Spartanburg, SC! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Middle Tyger YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Middle Tyger YMCA in Duncan, SC! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Spartanburg Athletic Club Pickleball Courts
description: Spartanburg Athletic Club Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Spartanburg, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Thomas E. Hannah Family YMCA
description: Thomas E. Hannah Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Spartanburg, SC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Va-Du-Mar McMillan Park
description: Come play pickleball at Va-Du-Mar McMillan Park in Boiling Springs, SC! There are 16 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Willis Road YMCA
description: Willis Road YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Spartanburg, SC. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons.
